mentions.note: Now at 13x earnings after sharp selloff; appears overcorrected lower. Sells Modelo Especial (most US beer revenue); headwinds from tariffs, immigration policy, and GLP-1 drugs manageable at this valuation.

New CEO Nick Fink (ex-Fortune Brands, Jim Beam) can revitalize portfolio anchored by top beer Modelo. Subtle turn in beer, definite turn in ready-to-drink cocktail market. Worth buying ahead of Wednesday after-close earnings.
